title: Thermal No More Crafting Alloys
description: Disables crafting Thermal's alloy ingots in crafting table using fire charges.
body:
![The recipe type the mod removes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02432391ba6e132e23c0dfd2da12983c10fd5731.png)

**Thermal: No More Crafting Alloys** removes the unnecessary crafting of alloy ingots in the crafting table, encouraging players to utilize proper machinery instead.

Note: 
I do not claim ownership of any content from CoFH and am not affiliated with them.
This mod is simply a personal fix that I’m making available to the community.
If there's a need to remove it due to copyright/license issues please contact via x@protheon.xyz
